name: Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups self-rising white cornmeal (yellow or white)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a cast iron skillet (8 inch) with enough vegetable oil to coat the bottom in an oven set to 200°C (400°F).
2. Mix all ingredients except the oil, adding enough buttermilk to make the batter thick and easily pourable.
3. Once the oven has reached 200°C (400°F), pour the batter into the heated skillet.
4. Bake until brown, about 30-40 minutes. Be careful as the skillet and oil are very hot.
5. This recipe requires practice and experimentation. Some may enjoy adding niblets corn to the batter.
